prompt: Can you double-check that our prices and revenue splits are right everywhere, and that the hard stops and acknowledgment can't be skipped?

assertions.text: Cross-checks prices/splits against lib/orders/pricing.ts and routing.ts SSOT
Flags that hard stops and/or acknowledgment are bypassable (client-side only)
Findings cite file:line with severity ratings
Distinguishes confirmed bugs from intentional business values
